storage.value:
Cold-weather reserve premium

Panel-cause fires occurring Nov through Feb trend 15 percent above pattern median. Cause: displaced-family ALE inflation during heating season. Do not adjust initial reserve upward. Instead schedule a mandatory Day 15 review — not the standard Day 30 — because ALE decisions accelerate in this window.

Escalation trigger

If ALE exceeds $4,500 per week by Day 12, escalate to manager for extension pre-approval before Day 20. Historical data across 30 tickets shows this is where reserve drift is expensive.

results.title: Manufacturer recall database — panel model lookup

storage.value:
Active recalls (as of Q2 2026)

  • FPE Stab-Lok — active since 2018, ongoing
  • Zinsco Sylvania — active since 2020, ongoing
  • Challenger — active 2019-2025, closed

Search process

  1. Get exact model number from fire marshal report
  2. Check against active list above
  3. If match, open subrogation file same day
  4. Preserve panel with photo documentation

results.title: The no-4A recall path — a common junior mistake

storage.value:
Preserve the panel anyway

Junior adjusters see a small fire with no Endorsement 4A on the policy and assume there's no subrogation path. This is wrong. Manufacturer recall subrogation is available on ANY panel-cause fire regardless of endorsement. Endorsement 4A only affects dwelling extension exposure — not the mechanical subro path.

Rule

Preserve the panel on every panel-cause fire. Every one. Even the small ones. The chain of custody is cheap; recovery is meaningful to the book.
